title: Layer Transmissions
content:
# CN Revision

*   **Nyquist vs Shannon:** Nyquist limits noiseless channels ($2B \log_2 L$); Shannon limits noisy channels ($B \log_2(1 + S/N)$).
*   **TCP Congestion Control:** Slow Start (exponential growth) $\to$ Congestion Avoidance (linear growth) $\to$ Fast Recovery.
*   **TLS 1.3:** Complete handshake in 1 RTT using ECDHE keys in ClientHello.


*   **Layer Transmissions Complexity Reference:** Time $O(N)$, Space $O(1)$ auxiliary.
